title: curie local|cluster observability --json
description: The agent-facing payload of `curie local observability --json` and `curie cluster observability --json`. Exactly one of two shapes is emitted per invocation: the resolved observability surfaces, or (cluster tier only) a `--dry-run` descriptor of the discovery commands a real run would execute.

oneOf.title: surfaces
oneOf.description: One row per observability surface. An additive superset of the shipped {"surfaces":[{"name","url"}]} contract -- `note` and `browsable` are new. `url` is a parseable URL or null (degraded); `note` is a hint/error string or null. The two are never overloaded onto one field. All four row keys are always present, with explicit nulls.

oneOf.title: dry-run
oneOf.description: A `--dry-run` preview (cluster tier only, delegated to the shared `DryRunPlan`): `plan` is the shell command lines a real run would execute, already credential-masked.
